name: Connectivity Graph
description: Builds a JSON Graph Format (JGF) connectivity network from a correlation matrix and an ROI list. Stores every pairwise weight; thresholding is done interactively in the viewer.
author: Daniel Zanelli

description.en: CSV with a square correlation matrix (e.g. the Pearson matrix)
description.es: CSV con una matriz de correlación cuadrada (p. ej. la matriz de Pearson)

description.en: ImageJ/FIJI ROI ZIP. ROI i corresponds to row/column i of the matrix
description.es: ZIP de ROIs de ImageJ/FIJI. El ROI i corresponde a la fila/columna i de la matriz

graph_jgf.en: Path to the JSON Graph Format (.jgf) connectivity graph
graph_jgf.es: Ruta del grafo de conectividad en JSON Graph Format (.jgf)
